name: Lobu
description: Agent skills published by the Lobu open-source platform. Each skill can be installed into a Lobu agent via its SKILL.md manifest.

skills.name: getting-started
skills.description: Install and run your first Lobu agent end-to-end.

skills.name: skills-guide
skills.description: How Lobu skills work: SKILL.md manifests, nix packages, and allowed domains.

skills.name: memory
skills.description: Persistent agent memory via Lobu memory.

skills.name: mcp-proxy
skills.description: How the gateway proxies MCP tool calls and resolves provider credentials server-side.

skills.name: tool-policy
skills.description: Approval model for destructive MCP tools and per-agent tool configuration.

skills.name: evals
skills.description: Automated agent-behavior evaluation with YAML eval definitions.

skills.name: skill-md-reference
skills.description: Reference for the SKILL.md manifest format.

skills.name: lobu-config-reference
skills.description: Reference for the lobu.config.ts agent configuration file.
